stemHtml: Which of these statements about boundary layers is correct?

options.a: A turbulent boundary layer produces less friction drag than a laminar one.
options.b: A turbulent boundary layer turns into a laminar one at the transition point.
options.c: A laminar boundary layer is thinner than a turbulent one.
options.d: Compared with a turbulent boundary layer, a laminar boundary layer is better able to resist a positive pressure gradient before it separates.
